talk_title: AI-assisted mammography screening improves hard patient outcomes – evidence from randomized trials
MOA_summary: Deep learning models applied to digital mammograms generate cancer detection scores that are integrated into radiology workflow, leading to higher detection of malignancies and improved downstream patient outcomes compared with standard radiologist-only interpretation.
key_findings: European randomized controlled trials of AI-assisted mammography screening demonstrated a statistically significant increase in cancer detection rates versus standard screening.
AI integration did not increase false-positive recall rates, maintaining comparable specificity to radiologist-only reads.
The trials showed downstream improvement in patient outcomes, including earlier-stage diagnosis and reduced mortality.
